Package org.solenopsis.soap.tooling

Class BriefcaseRuleFilter

java.lang.Object
org.solenopsis.soap.tooling.BriefcaseRuleFilter
public class BriefcaseRuleFilter extends Object

Java class for BriefcaseRuleFilter complex type

.

The following schema fragment specifies the expected content contained within this class.


 <complexType name="BriefcaseRuleFilter">
   <complexContent>
     <restriction base="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}anyType">
       <sequence>
         <element name="filterOperator" type="{urn:tooling.soap.sforce.com}BriefcaseFilterOperator"/>
         <element name="filterSeqNumber" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}int"/>
         <element name="filterValue" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}string" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="targetEntityField" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}string"/>
       </sequence>
     </restriction>
   </complexContent>
 </complexType>
